llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution describes a purchase of a '2-bedroom, 2-bathroom modern condo' in Downtown Toronto for CAD $465,000. Among the ground-truth purchase options, this best matches the 'New Build' entry because it includes modern and smart-home features, is within the budget range (~$480K), and aligns with the eco-conscious and minimalist preferences of the buyer. For financing, the assistant selected a mortgage with 10% down payment, suitable for a first-time buyer, corresponding to 'First-Time Buyer' in the ground-truth purchase_financing section. The legal service chosen was 'Premium Legal Package', which exists in the legal_administrative section. The moving service selected was 'Standard Moving Package', which matches 'Standard Moving'. The utility setup 'Basic Utilities' and survey 'Full Structural Survey' both appear in the ground-truth moving_setup_services and legal_administrative sections respectively. Therefore, the final property solution maps to: New Build (10), First-Time Buyer (10), Premium Legal Package (8), Standard Moving (9), Basic Utilities (6), and Full Structural Survey (8).
